testcase.name: @BeforeMethod before

failure.message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 126 Current browser version is 147.0.7727.138 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Build info: version: '3.141.59', revision: 'e82be7d358', time: '2018-11-14T08:17:03' System info: host: 'DESKTOP-BHR3PSD', ip: '192.168.1.27', os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.1' Driver info: driver.version: ChromeDriver remote stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x009EC1C3+27395] (No symbol) [0x00983DC4] (No symbol) [0x00881B7F] (No symbol) [0x008B4B8A] (No symbol) [0x008B3EED] (No symbol) [0x008AEFAF] (No symbol) [0x008AAC69] (No symbol) [0x008ED58E] (No symbol) [0x008ECDAA] (No symbol) [0x008E3736] (No symbol) [0x008B7541] (No symbol) [0x008B80BD] GetHandleVerifier [0x00CA3A93+2876371] GetHandleVerifier [0x00CF7F5D+3221661] GetHandleVerifier [0x00A6D634+556916] GetHandleVerifier [0x00A7474C+585868] (No symbol) [0x0098CE04] (No symbol) [0x00989818] (No symbol) [0x009899B7] (No symbol) [0x0097BF0E] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75FA5D49+25] RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x77E6D83B+107] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x77E6D7C1+561]
